title: Medical History of Drugs and Supplements from Questionnaire R0
description: Variables from the medical history section of the first round of questionnaire for The Generations Study about the participant's history of medical drugs and other supplements.

StudyID.description: Unique 6-digit identifier for each participant in the study.

R0_NonBCTamoxRaloxUse.x-question: Other than for the treatment of breast cancer, have you ever used or are you currently using the drugs tamoxifen (Soltamox, Nolvadex-D, or Tamofen) or raloxifene (Evista)?
R0_NonBCTamoxRaloxUse.description: Participant's use of tamoxifen (Soltamox, Nolvadex-D, or Tamofen) or raloxifene (Evista).

R0_NonBCDrugType.x-question: If yes, which drug did you use? (Tamoxifen, Raloxifene)
R0_NonBCDrugType.description: Which drug, tamoxifen or raloxifene, the participant used.

R0_NonBCDrugStartAge.x-question: At what age did you first use it?
R0_NonBCDrugStartAge.description: At what age the participant began using the drug.

R0_NonBCDrugDurationYrs.x-question: For how long in total did you use it? - Years
R0_NonBCDrugDurationYrs.description: The duration, in years, that the participant was using the drug.

R0_NonBCDrugDurationMnths.x-question: For how long in total did you use it? - Months
R0_NonBCDrugDurationMnths.description: If years were not round, how many months of top of the year the participant was using the drug.

R0_NonBCDrugOngoing.x-question: For how long in total did you use it? - Still using
R0_NonBCDrugOngoing.description: Indicator that the participant is still using the drug.

R0_NonBCDrugEpisodes.x-question: If you have used these drugs for more than one episode, please provide details.
R0_NonBCDrugEpisodes.description: Indicator whether the participant has used these drugs for more than one episode.
x-enumDescriptions: 1: If you have used these drugs for more than one episode, please provide details.

R0_GrowthHormoneUse.x-question: Have you ever been treated with growth hormone?
R0_GrowthHormoneUse.description: Whether the participant has ever been treated by growth hormones.

R0_AcneMedsPrescribed.x-question: Have you ever been prescribed tablets or pills by a doctor for acne?
R0_AcneMedsPrescribed.description: Whether the participant has ever been prescribed acne pills or tablets.

R0_AcneMedsStartAge.x-question: If yes, at what age did you start treatment?
R0_AcneMedsStartAge.description: Starting age of the participant for taking acne pills or tablets.

R0_AntibioticsRecentUse.x-question: In the last 12 months, have you taken antibiotics by mouth or injection (not mouthwash or topical treatments)?
R0_AntibioticsRecentUse.description: If the participant has taken antibiotics by mouth or injection in the 12 months pre-entry into the study.

R0_AntibioticsDays.x-question: If yes, on how many days in the last 12 months did you take antibiotics?
R0_AntibioticsDays.description: Number of days that the participant took antibiotics in the 12 months pre-entry into the study.

R0_AspirinRecentUse.x-question: Have you taken aspirin or any products containing aspirin in the last 7 days?
R0_AspirinRecentUse.description: Whether the participant has taken any aspirin or products containing aspirin in the 7 days pre-entry to the study.

R0_AspirinDays.x-question: If yes, on how many days did you take aspirin in the last 7 days?
R0_AspirinDays.description: Number of days that the participant took aspirin in the 7 days pre-entry into the study.

AspirinRegularUse.description: Occurrences where participant took aspirin regularly (daily or almost daily for 6 months).

R0_AspirinRegularEp.x-question: Have you ever taken aspirin or products containing aspirin regularly (every day or almost every day for 6 months or longer)?
R0_AspirinRegularEp.description: Whether the participant has taken aspirin regularly over a period of time of at least 6 months.

R0_AspirinStartAgeEp.x-question: Age at start for taking aspirin regularly.
R0_AspirinStartAgeEp.description: Participants starting age of taking aspirin regularly for this instance.

R0_AspirinEndAgeEp.x-question: Age at end for taking aspirin regularly.
R0_AspirinEndAgeEp.description: Participants ending age of taking aspirin regularly for this instance.

R0_AspirinOngoingEp.description: Participant is still taking aspiring regularly during entry to study for this instance.

AspirinRegularUseExtra.description: Extra information on occurrences where participant took aspirin regularly (daily or almost daily for 6 months).

R0_AspirinStartMnth.x-question: Month of start for taking aspirin regularly
R0_AspirinStartMnth.description: Month of the year in which the participant started taking aspirin regularly for this instance.

R0_AspirinStartYr.x-question: Year of start for taking aspirin regularly
R0_AspirinStartYr.description: Year in which the participant started taking aspirin regularly for this instance.

R0_AspirinEndMnth.x-question: Month when stopped taking aspirin regularly
R0_AspirinEndMnth.description: Month of the year in which the participant stopped taking aspirin regularly for this instance.

R0_AspirinEndYr.x-question: Year when stopped taking aspirin regularly
R0_AspirinEndYr.description: Year in which the participant stopped taking aspirin regularly for this instance.

R0_AspirinMoreEpisodes.x-question: If there were other periods in your life where you took aspirin regularly, please provide details.
R0_AspirinMoreEpisodes.description: Whether the participant had more than 2 episode of taking aspiring regularly.
x-enumDescriptions: 1: Yes, there were more than two periods of taking aspirin.

R0_AspirinMoreThanFive.x-question: More than 5 occasions of Aspirin consumption?

R0_IbuprofenRecentUse.x-question: Have you taken any products containing ibuprofen in the last 7 days?

R0_IbuprofenDays.x-question: If yes, on how many days did you take ibuprofen in the last 7 days?

IbuprofenRegularUse.description: Occurrences where participant took ibuprofen-containing medication regularly (daily or almost daily for ≥6 months).

R0_IbuprofenRegularEp.x-question: Have you ever taken ibuprofen or medication containing ibuprofen regularly (every day or almost every day for 6 months or longer)?
R0_IbuprofenRegularEp.description: Whether the participant has ever taken ibuprofen regularly for at least 6 months.

R0_IbuprofenStartAgeEp.x-question: Age at start of taking medication containing Ibuprofen.
R0_IbuprofenStartAgeEp.description: Age participant started taking ibuprofen regularly for this instance.

R0_IbuprofenEndAgeEp.x-question: Age at end of taking medication containing Ibuprofen
R0_IbuprofenEndAgeEp.description: Age participant stopped taking ibuprofen regularly for this instance.

R0_IbuprofenOngoingEp.description: Whether the participant is still taking ibuprofen regularly at entry to study.

IbuprofenRegularUseExtra.description: Extra information on occurrences where participant took ibuprofen-containing medication regularly (daily or almost daily for 6 months).

R0_IbuprofenStartMnthEp.x-question: Month of start for taking Ibuprofen regularly
R0_IbuprofenStartMnthEp.description: Month of the year that the participant started taking ibuprofen regularly.

R0_IbuprofenStartYrEp.x-question: Year of start for taking Ibuprofen regularly
R0_IbuprofenStartYrEp.description: Year that the participant started taking ibuprofen regularly.

R0_IbuprofenEndMnthEp.x-question: Month when stopped taking Ibuprofen regularly
R0_IbuprofenEndMnthEp.description: Month of the year that the participant stopped taking ibuprofen regularly.

R0_IbuprofenEndYrEp.x-question: Year when stopped taking Ibuprofen regularly
R0_IbuprofenEndYrEp.description: Year that the participant stopped taking ibuprofen regularly.

R0_IbuprofenMoreEpisodes.x-question: If there were other periods in your life where you took ibuprofen regularly, please provide details.
R0_IbuprofenMoreEpisodes.description: Indicator if there were more than two occasions when the participant took ibuprofen regularly.

R0_OtherPainkillersRecentUse.x-question: Have you taken any other painkillers in the last 7 days?
R0_OtherPainkillersRecentUse.description: Whether the participant has taken painkillers in the 7 days pre-study entry.

R0_OtherPainkillersDays.x-question: If yes, on how many days did you take painkillers in the last 7 days?
R0_OtherPainkillersDays.description: How many of those 7 days pre-study entry did the participant take other painkillers.

R0_OtherRecentPainkillerName.x-question: What was the name of the painkiller?
R0_OtherRecentPainkillerName.description: The name of the other painkiller the participant took.

OtherPainkillersRegularUse.description: Occurrences where participant took other painkillers regularly (daily or almost daily for 6 months).

R0_PainkillersOccasion_Num.description: Other painkillers regular use occasion number.

R0_OtherPainkillersRegular.x-question: Have you ever taken other painkillers regularly (every day or almost every day for 6 months or longer)?
R0_OtherPainkillersRegular.description: Whether the participant has taken other painkillers regularly over at least 6 months.

R0_OtherPainkillersStartAge.x-question: Age at start for taking other painkillers regularly
R0_OtherPainkillersStartAge.description: Age the participant started taking other painkillers regularly.

R0_OtherPainkillersEndAge.x-question: Age at end for taking other painkillers regularly
R0_OtherPainkillersEndAge.description: Age the participant stopped taking other painkillers regularly.

R0_OtherPainkillersOngoing.description: Whether the participant is still taking other painkillers at study entry.

R0_OtherPainkillersName.x-question: What was the name of the painkiller you took regularly?
R0_OtherPainkillersName.description: The name of the painkillers the participant is taking.

OtherPainkillersRegularUseExtra.description: Extra information on occurrences where participant took other painkillers regularly (daily or almost daily for 6 months).

R0_OtherPainkillersStartMth.x-question: Month of start for taking other painkillers regularly
R0_OtherPainkillersStartMth.description: Which month of the year the participant started taking other painkillers regularly.

R0_OtherPainkillersStartYr.x-question: Year of start for taking other painkillers regularly
R0_OtherPainkillersStartYr.description: Which year the participant started taking other painkillers regularly.

R0_OtherPainkillersEndMth.x-question: Month when stopped for taking other painkillers regularly
R0_OtherPainkillersEndMth.description: Which month of the year the participant stopped taking other painkillers regularly.

R0_OtherPainkillersEndYr.x-question: Year when stopped for taking other painkillers regularly
R0_OtherPainkillersEndYr.description: Which year the participant stopped taking other painkillers regularly.

R0_OtherPainkillersMoreEpisodes.x-question: If there were other periods in your life where you took other painkillers regularly, please provide details.
R0_OtherPainkillersMoreEpisodes.description: Indicator if there were more than two occasions when the participant took other painkillers regularly.

R0_OtherPainkillersMoreThanFive.description: Indicator if there were more than five occasions when the participant took other painkillers regularly.

R0_FolicAcidSuppUse.x-question: Have you ever taken folic acid or folate supplements?
R0_FolicAcidSuppUse.description: Whether the participant has every taken folic acid supplements.

R0_FolicAcidDurationYrs.x-question: If yes, for how many years in total did you take folic acid or folate?
R0_FolicAcidDurationYrs.description: How many years the participant has taken folic acid supplements, if they have.

R0_VitaminDSuppUse.x-question: Have you ever taken vitamin D supplements?
R0_VitaminDSuppUse.description: Whether the participant has ever taken vitamin D supplements.

R0_VitaminDDurationYrs.x-question: If yes, for how many years in total did you take vitamin D?
R0_VitaminDDurationYrs.description: How many years the participant has taken vitamin D supplements, if they have.

R0_CalciumSuppUse.x-question: Have you ever taken calcium supplements?
R0_CalciumSuppUse.description: Whether the participant has ever taken calcium supplements.

R0_CalciumDurationYrs.x-question: If yes, for how many years in total did you take calcium?
R0_CalciumDurationYrs.description: How many years the participant has taken calcium supplements, if they have.

R0_VitaminSuppRecentUse.x-question: In the last 7 days, have you taken any vitamin or other supplements?
R0_VitaminSuppRecentUse.description: In the 7 days before study entry, whether the participant has taken any other vitamin or supplements.

R0_VitaminSuppMultivitamin.x-question: If yes, which supplement did you take? - Multivitamin
R0_VitaminSuppMultivitamin.description: If the participant took a multivitamin.

R0_VitaminSuppCodLiverOil.x-question: If yes, which supplement did you take? - Cod liver oil
R0_VitaminSuppCodLiverOil.description: If the participant took cod liver oil.

R0_VitaminSuppOther.description: If the participant took any other vitamin supplement.

VitaminSuppOther.description: Occurrences where participant took other vitamins and the names of those other vitamins.

R0_VitaminTextSuppOther.description: Text of the other vitamin supplement taken by the participant.

R0_MelatoninUse.x-question: Have you ever taken a drug called melatonin?
R0_MelatoninUse.description: Whether the participant has ever taken melatonin.

R0_StatinUse.x-question: Have you ever taken cholesterol-lowering drugs called 'statins'? (Simvastatin, Pravastatin, Atorvastatin, Fluvastatin, Rosuvastatin)
R0_StatinUse.description: Whether the participant has ever taken statins.
